caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is centered against a plain black background, speaking to the camera. She is wearing a light green tunic with floral embroidery around the neckline and a thin dark necklace. A small lavalier microphone is clipped to her clothing. In the bottom left and bottom center of the screen, a circular logo is visible with the text "NPTEL" written beside it. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in a static position, though her facial expressions shift as she speaks. Her eyes close briefly, and her mouth moves in a rhythmic pattern of speech, reflecting the natural motion of a conversation or lecture. The lighting is consistent across the scene, focusing on her face and shoulders while leaving the background entirely dark.
